meta_title: For Students: Antigravity project template to Solve can't debug code (Advanced Comparison)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome can't debug code. A Advanced-level Comparison using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Antigravity Project Template: Solve Debugging for Students
content.seo_description: Master complex debugging with the Antigravity project template. A high-level guide for students to ship production-ready code using Claude Code.
content.answer_block: Stop staring at cryptic stack traces. By integrating the Antigravity project template with Claude Code, you automate diagnostic reasoning. This workflow maps your architectural intent against execution logs, identifying logic gaps in seconds. It transforms debugging from a frustrating trial-and-error cycle into a precise, systematic engineering process for students.
content.intro:
You’re staring at a screen filled with red text, the clock is ticking on your project deadline, and the bug seems to defy the laws of logic. You’ve refactored, you’ve googled, and you’ve felt that crushing weight of imposter syndrome—the feeling that your code is a house of cards waiting to collapse. It’s the rite of passage for every developer, but it doesn't have to be your permanent reality.

Professional engineering isn't about knowing every syntax rule; it's about mastering the leverage of intelligent systems to bridge the gap between intent and execution. The Antigravity project template provides the structural foundation that forces your code to be testable, while Claude Code acts as your senior pair programmer. Together, they turn your debugging nightmare into a masterclass in software architecture.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish a robust project structure that enforces modularity, making it easier to isolate bugs within specific services.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize an Antigravity project structure with strict type-safety, modular service layers, and a decoupled error-handling schema.

steps.title: Inject Diagnostic Instrumentation
steps.description: Before debugging, you need visibility. Use the template to inject automated logging hooks into your business logic.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Add automated telemetry middleware to all service endpoints to capture execution state and variable snapshots on failure.

steps.title: Map Execution Flows
steps.description: Define your expected data flow so the system can detect deviations that lead to runtime errors.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a visual execution flow map for the current service to identify potential race conditions or unhandled promise rejections.

steps.title: Automate Root Cause Analysis
steps.description: Feed your logs into Claude Code to pinpoint the exact line of failure within the Antigravity architecture.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the attached error logs against the project schema and identify the root cause of the current runtime exception.

steps.title: Deploy Hotfix and Verify
steps.description: Apply the fix and run regression tests to ensure the solution doesn't introduce side effects.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Draft a surgical patch for the identified bug and generate a unit test that validates the fix while ensuring existing logic remains intact.

pro_tips: Always treat your logs as data structures, not just strings; use JSON-formatted logging for easier parsing by AI agents.
Use Antigravity’s 'Schema-First' approach to define your data models before writing logic to prevent type-mismatch bugs at compile time.
Configure Claude Code with a system prompt that explicitly restricts it to 'Socratic debugging'—forcing it to ask you questions rather than just dumping code.
When stuck, use the 'diff' command in Claude Code to compare your broken implementation against a known-good Antigravity boilerplate component.
Document your debugging process inside the project's README as a 'Post-Mortem' section; it builds an incredible portfolio narrative for future recruiters.
content.next_steps: Once your first project is stable, focus on implementing CI/CD pipelines to automate your testing suite, ensuring that your Antigravity template remains bug-free as you scale your features.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to stop debugging manually and start building like a senior architect. Don't let your code hold you back from shipping your vision. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
